title: galium coronatum var. tauricum
intro: Galium coronatum var. tauricum, also known as the tauric bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium coronatum plant, which is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Galium coronatum var. tauricum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Galium coronatum var. tauricum has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
